name: consumer_app
description: A viral consumer app riding a trend wave. Growth is explosive but the trend dies fast. Needs a very early pivot. Very hard — agent must act before signals are obvious.
data_sources: Vitally.io 2024 — viral consumer app churn 12-22%/mo (free-to-paid conversion low)
Carta 2024 — consumer app seed burn $85-100K/mo (lower than enterprise)
OpenView 2023 — viral consumer growth can hit 14%/mo at peak
CB Insights 2024 — 47% of consumer app failures due to trend decay without retention

real_world_parallel.example: Twitter pivot from Odeo podcast platform (month 18, 7mo runway) — iTunes killed the market

notes: Consumer app churn 12%/mo is realistic for viral apps (Vitally.io 2024). 16-month runway is below sector median — this is intentional for difficulty. Agent must pivot by step 28 or die. Phase transitions are fastest of all 5 scenarios.
